dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3596 IS: Stronger Start for Working Families Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Hassan (for herself and Mr. Young) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to modify the earned income threshold for the refundable child tax credit.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Stronger Start for Working Families Act.

section.header: Earned income threshold for refundable child tax credit

subsection.text: Section 24(d)(1)(B)(i) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by striking $3,000 and inserting $1.
Section 24(h) of such Code is amended by striking paragraph (6).
The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025.
